channel.title: Welcome to my Portfolio on MD.AKIB IQBAL MAJUMDER
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to my Portfolio on MD.AKIB IQBAL MAJUMDER

item.title: Project I: 2021 Kaggle Machine Learning & Data Science Survey
item.description: From a technical perspective, I do the following: Outline my analysis load in and briefly explore the data Check for null values Organize the data so that it can be easily used to create charts Create some basic charts with plotly express and plotly go Organize the data so that it can be segmented by profession Build one “advanced visual” showing you the 4 iterations that it took me to get there Build a dropdown button for comparing between different datas for “Advance visual” Amount of Women by country Comparing Education vs Position Link to Github Repository

item.title: Project II: Titanic Passanger Survival Analysis
item.description: Machine Learning : Split data into train and test sets Logistic Regression Prediction Workflow of the project Link to Github Repository

item.title: About
item.description: A hardworking and enthusiastic college student working towards a B.S.C in Computer Science. Seeking to use my superior knowledge of Data Science, machine learning and my advanced communication skills to effectively serve your company in an internship position. Dedicated and committed to becoming a dependable and valuable team member.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Follow me on these social media platforms. Platform URL Twitter: https://twitter.com/Akib_Iqbal20 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/md-akib-iqbal-majumder-2806891b0/ GitHub: https://github.com/akibiqbal98
